Apply Optimizations: Applies general system optimizations for better performance.
Dark Theme: Enables the system-wide Dark Theme for Windows.
Disable Action Center: Disables the Windows Action Center and notification sidebar.
Disable Cortana: Disables the Cortana voice assistant to save background resources.
Disable Transparency: Disables acrylic/Mica transparency effects in the Windows shell to improve UI responsiveness.
Light Theme: Enables the system-wide Light Theme for Windows.
Apply_Debloat_Profile: Applies a comprehensive profile to remove unnecessary Windows bloatware and pre-installed telemetry apps.
Remove_Sponsored_Apps: Removes sponsored apps (Candy Crush, etc.) that automatically install on Windows.
Remove_Unnecessary_MS_Apps: Removes unnecessary Microsoft stock applications like 3D Builder, Zune, and Mixed Reality.
Disable_Audio_Enhancements: Disables audio enhancements to reduce DPC latency and fix audio crackling in games.
Exclusive_Mode_Manager: Configures Windows Audio Exclusive Mode settings for lower latency audio processing.
Interactive_Manage_Background_Apps: Launches an interactive prompt to selectively disable UWP apps from running in the background.
Detect_Slow_Startup_Apps: Analyzes startup entries and flags applications that significantly impact boot times.
Generate_Boot_Trace: Generates an Event Tracing for Windows (ETW) boot trace to diagnose slow startup times.
Configure Edge Performance: Optimizes Microsoft Edge settings for lower memory and CPU usage.
Revert Edge Performance (Restore): Restores Microsoft Edge settings to their default configuration.
Apply_Privacy_Camera_Profile: Applies a strict privacy profile that blocks unauthorized applications from accessing the webcam.
Disable_App_Camera_Access: Prevents standard Windows applications from accessing the camera.
Disable_LockScreen_Camera: Disables the ability to use the camera while the computer is locked.
Apply_Privacy_Clipboard_Profile: Applies a strict privacy profile that restricts clipboard data from being synced to the cloud.
Disable_Clipboard_Cloud_Sync: Disables Windows 10/11 Clipboard Cloud Sync feature.
Disable_Clipboard_History: Disables the Windows Clipboard History (Win+V) feature to prevent sensitive data retention.
Configure_Developer_Mode: Enables Windows Developer Mode, allowing sideloading of apps and advanced developer settings.
Configure_WSL: Configures and optimizes the Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) environment.
Enable_Long_Paths: Removes the 260-character MAX_PATH limitation in Windows.
Install_PowerShell_7: Installs or updates to the latest cross-platform PowerShell 7.
Install_Windows_Terminal: Installs the modern Windows Terminal application.
Apply_Diagnostics_Privacy_Profile: Disables all non-essential Windows diagnostic data collection and telemetry.
Disable_Diagnostic_Data: Sets Windows Diagnostic Data collection to the absolute minimum (Basic/Security only).
Disable_Tailored_Experiences: Disables personalized tips, ads, and recommendations based on your diagnostic data.
Auto SR Settings Guide: Provides guidance on configuring Windows Auto Super Resolution (Auto SR).
Disable Windowed Game Optimizations (Res: Disables optimizations for windowed games, reverting to classic presentation models.
Enable Windowed Game Optimizations: Enables DXGI flip model for windowed games, reducing input lag and preventing screen tearing.
HDR Settings & Keyboard Shortcut: Configures HDR settings and registers the Win+Alt+B shortcut for toggling HDR.
Interactive_Manage_GPU_Preference: Allows you to manually assign High Performance or Power Saving GPU preferences per-application.
Open Graphics Settings: Opens the Windows Graphics Settings menu.
Analyze_DPC_Latency: Runs a diagnostic trace to analyze Deferred Procedure Call (DPC) latency which causes micro-stutters.
Backup_Installed_Drivers: Exports all installed third-party drivers to a backup folder.
Disable_Automatic_Driver_Replacement: Prevents Windows Update from automatically overwriting manually installed graphics and audio drivers.
Apply_Productivity_Explorer: Optimizes File Explorer for productivity by showing file extensions and hidden files.
Configure_Developer_View: Configures Explorer view settings tailored for software developers.
Disable_Recent_Frequent: Hides recent files and frequent folders in File Explorer's Quick Access.
Enable_Compact_View: Enables Compact View in Windows 11 Explorer to reduce row spacing.
Restore_Classic_ContextMenu: Restores the classic Windows 10 right-click context menu in Windows 11.
Set_Launch_To_This_PC: Sets File Explorer to open to 'This PC' instead of 'Quick Access'.
Enable Game Mode: Enables Windows Game Mode to prioritize CPU and GPU resources for games.
Apply_Gaming_GPU_Profile: Applies a registry profile optimized for low latency and high framerate gaming.
Enable_Hardware_Accelerated_GPU_Scheduli: Enables HAGS (Hardware-Accelerated GPU Scheduling) to reduce GPU overhead and improve framerates.
Disable Mouse Acceleration: Disables 'Enhance Pointer Precision', giving you raw 1:1 mouse input for gaming.
Disable_Mouse_Acceleration: Disables 'Enhance Pointer Precision', giving you raw 1:1 mouse input for gaming.
USB_Polling_Diagnostics: Diagnoses USB polling rates to ensure gaming mice are running at 1000Hz+.
Cap Delivery Optimization Bandwidth: Caps the background bandwidth used by Windows Update Delivery Optimization.
Disable Peer to Peer Updates: Disables peer-to-peer Windows Update sharing on the local network and internet.
Remove Bandwidth Caps (Restore): Removes any configured bandwidth limits for Windows Updates.
Reset_Network_Stack: Completely resets the TCP/IP stack, flushing DNS and clearing routing tables to fix networking issues.
Test_Latency_To_Game_Servers: Pings common game servers (Riot, Valve, Blizzard) to test connection latency and jitter.
Apply_Desktop_Power_Profile: Applies a power profile optimized for desktop PCs (High Performance).
Apply_Laptop_Battery_Profile: Applies a power profile optimized for laptop battery life.
Disable_Hibernation: Disables Windows Hibernation (powercfg -h off) to free up gigabytes of disk space.
Disable_USB_Selective_Suspend: Disables USB Selective Suspend to prevent USB devices (like mice/DACs) from going to sleep.
Enable_Ultimate_Performance_Plan: Unlocks and enables the hidden 'Ultimate Performance' Windows power plan.
Disable App Metadata Access: Prevents apps from accessing metadata about other running apps.
Disable Camera: Completely disables the Windows camera subsystem via registry.
Disable Microphone: Completely disables the Windows microphone subsystem via registry.
Disable Notifications: Completely disables Windows toast notifications and Action Center banners.
Apply_Gaming_Master_Profile: Applies the ultimate combination of tweaks designed specifically for competitive gaming and lowest latency.
Apply_Privacy_Master_Profile: Applies the ultimate combination of privacy tweaks, disabling all telemetry, data collection, and cloud sync.
Apply_Workstation_Master_Profile: Applies a balanced profile meant for heavy productivity, development, and stability.
InSpectre: A portable utility by Gibson Research Corporation that examines the system's hardware and software vulnerability to Meltdown and Spectre attacks, allowing you to enable or disable the CPU mitigations.
Aplicar: Applies the custom CPU Power Plan.
QuickCPU: Power plan configuration file for QuickCPU.
Games Priority: Sets registry keys to automatically grant high CPU priority to known game executables.
Revert Changes: Reverts the applied tweaks in this category back to Windows defaults.
Windows Priority: Resets CPU priority to default Windows behavior.
memreduct: A lightweight real-time memory management utility to monitor and clean system memory on the fly.
Optimizar SSD: Applies optimizations for Solid State Drives (disables defrag, optimizes prefetch/superfetch).
Disable Compression: Disables Windows 10/11 memory compression (SysMain) to reduce CPU overhead at the cost of using more physical RAM.
Optimize Services: Disables unnecessary background services like Windows Biometric Service and Font Cache to free up RAM and CPU cycles.
Disable Telemetry: Disables Windows Telemetry and Data Collection via registry policies.
Delete Temporary Files: Clears the Windows Temp, %AppData% Temp, and SoftwareDistribution download caches.
Apply_Privacy_Search_Profile: Applies a profile to make Windows Search local-only, stopping Bing integration.
Disable_Local_Search_History: Prevents Windows from storing local search history.
Disable_Search_Highlights: Disables the daily web highlights and Bing images in the Windows Search menu.
Disable_Web_Search: Completely unhooks Bing Web Search from the Start Menu, making searches instant and local-only.
Rebuild_Search_Index: Forces Windows to rebuild the local file search index.
Configure_SmartScreen: Configures Windows Defender SmartScreen behavior for apps, files, and Edge.
Firewall_Profile_Manager: Provides interactive management of Windows Defender Firewall profiles (Domain/Private/Public).
Memory_Integrity_Manager: Allows you to toggle Core Isolation / Memory Integrity (HVCI), which can impact gaming performance.
Apply_Clean_Services_Profile: Disables a curated list of unnecessary Windows background services.
Disable_Telemetry_Services: Disables DiagTrack and other services responsible for sending telemetry to Microsoft.
Apply_Minimal_Shell: Configures the Windows Shell to be as minimal and responsive as possible.
Disable_Copilot_Taskbar: Removes the Windows Copilot icon from the Taskbar.
Disable_Notification_Spam: Disables 'suggested' notifications, tips, and Windows welcome experience popups.
Disable_Windows_Widgets: Uninstalls and completely disables the Windows 11 Widgets board.
Remove_Recommended_Section: Hides the 'Recommended' section in the Windows 11 Start Menu.
Interactive_Manage_Startup_Apps: Launches a tool to easily view and disable applications running at system startup.
Disable Storage Sense (Restore): Disables Windows Storage Sense automated cleanup.
Enable Storage Sense: Enables Windows Storage Sense to automatically clean up temporary files.
Safe Temporary Cleanup: Performs a safe cleanup of basic temporary directories without touching critical caches.
Analyze_SSD_Health: Queries SMART data via WMI to analyze the health and remaining life of your SSD.
Check_TRIM_Status: Verifies that TRIM is enabled for your SSDs to ensure maximum write performance.
Optimize_Pagefile_Configuration: Configures a static, optimized Windows Pagefile size based on your physical RAM.
Deep Component Cleanup (Aggressive): Uses DISM to aggressively clean up the WinSxS component store and reclaim maximum disk space.
Apply_Privacy_Sync_Profile: Disables all Windows account syncing to Microsoft servers.
Disable_Activity_History: Disables Windows Timeline and Activity History collection.
Disable_Windows_Settings_Sync: Prevents Windows from syncing your wallpaper, passwords, and preferences to the cloud.
Uninstall_OneDrive: Completely uninstalls Microsoft OneDrive and removes its integration from File Explorer.
Disable Windows Update: Aggressively disables the Windows Update service and scheduled tasks.
Extreme_Debloat: An extreme debloat script that removes almost all built-in UWP applications and deeply embedded features. USE WITH CAUTION.
Apply_Clean_Tasks_Profile: Disables unnecessary Windows Scheduled Tasks (like Customer Experience Improvement Program).
Disable_Telemetry_Tasks: Disables Scheduled Tasks that trigger telemetry collection and uploading.
Interactive_Clean_Boot_Manager: Helps you configure a 'Clean Boot' by disabling all third-party services for troubleshooting.
Apply_Update_Control_Profile: Configures Windows Update to notify before downloading, preventing unexpected reboots and ping spikes.
Disable_Automatic_Driver_Updates: Stops Windows Update from automatically installing potentially broken driver updates.
Disable_Delivery_Optimization: Completely disables the Delivery Optimization service (peer-to-peer updates).
Apply_Balanced_Aesthetic_Profile: Applies visual settings that look good but still maintain solid performance.
Apply_Max_Performance_Profile: Disables almost all Windows visual effects for maximum system performance.
Disable_Unnecessary_Animations: Disables window minimize/maximize animations to make the OS feel snappier.
Reduce_Menu_Show_Delay: Reduces the delay (in milliseconds) before context menus and submenus appear on hover.
